    Unit tests for the auto-tactic FunAppInDomGoalAutoTac
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel
    Enumeration of all the relation and function : REL : "↔" (Relation) TREL : "" (Total Relation) SREL : "" (Surjective Relation) STREL : "" (Total Surjective Relation) PFUN : "⇸" (Partial Function) TFUN : "→" (Total Function) PINJ : "⤔" (Partial Injection) TINJ : "↣" (Total Injection) PSUR : "⤀" (Partial Surjection) TSUR : "↠" (Total Surjection) TBIJ : "⤖" (Bijection)
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.PFunAndPRel
    Enumeration of all the partial function and not total relation : REL : "↔" (Relation) SREL : "" (Surjective Relation) PFUN : "⇸" (Partial Function) PINJ : "⤔" (Partial Injection) PSUR : "⤀" (Partial Surjection)
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.TFunAndTRel
    Enumeration of all the total function and total relation: TREL : "" (Total Relation) STREL : "" (Total Surjective Relation) TFUN : "→" (Total Function) TINJ : "↣" (Total Injection) TSUR : "↠" (Total Surjection) TBIJ : "⤖" (Bijection)
